##NAMES=Kidwellite
##RRUFFID=R060324
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=NaFe^3+^_9+x_(PO_4_)_6_(OH)_11_·3H_2_O (x ≈ 0.33)
##LOCALITY=York mine, Polk County, Arkansas, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Light green radiating acicular crystals forming a spherical mat
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060324
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_0.98_Ca_0.02_)(Fe^3+^_8.77_Al_0.21_Fe^2+^_0.02_)(P_1.00_O_4_)_6_(OH)_11_·3H_2_O ; OH estimated by charge balance  H_2_O by difference
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 20.036 b: 5.1809 c: 14.0678 alpha: 90 beta: 106.959 gamma: 90 volume: 1396.8 crystal system: monoclinic
